resources.title: 🌿 Natural Resources
resources.html:
The Earth gives us many things we need to live. These things are called natural resources. Water, air, sunlight and wood are all natural resources.

We use wood to build houses and make paper. Wood comes from trees. We use water to drink, cook and wash. We use sunlight to grow food and to make energy.

But sometimes people are not careful with resources. People throw away a lot of trash. The trash goes to a landfill. A landfill is a big area of land full of rubbish. Landfills are bad for the Earth.

Cars and factories make smoke. Smoke makes the air dirty. Dirty air is bad for people and animals.

We can help the Earth! We can reduce — that means use less. We can reuse — that means use things again. If we all reduce and reuse, we can take care of our planet!

activities.title: 🏕️ Fun in Nature
activities.html:
Nature is wonderful! There are many fun things to do outside.

You can camp in the forest. When you camp, you sleep in a tent. You can see the stars at night! The campfire is in front of the tent. The tall trees are behind the tent.

You can ride a horse in the countryside. The horse walks next to the river. There is a bridge across from the farm. A little duck is swimming between the two big rocks in the river.

In summer, you can go to the beach and surf on the waves. You can also fish in the lake. In winter, you can ski in the mountains. You can also bike on the paths in the park.

Where is the best place to play? Is there a park next to your house? Nature is everywhere — go outside and enjoy it!
